source.name: Level 6: 6.4 Knowledge Check - main agent and sub-agent
source.instructions: **What is the relationship between the main agent and the sub-agent?**

answers.answer: The sub-agent replaces the main agent
The main agent orchestrates; it runs a flow that calls the sub-agent; the sub-agent runs until done, then control returns
The sub-agent calls the main agent

source.learningObjectives: SWBAT describe main and sub-agent relationship
source.guidance: Main agent runs a flow; the flow has a step that calls the sub-agent; sub-agent runs until done, then control returns.
